arts.ttl: Report: Ruben Amorim is unhappy with two things happening at Man United
arts.sum: Among the top Premier League sides, Manchester United are struggling the most. While Liverpool and Arsenal are involved in the title race and Manchester City and Chelsea are fighting for a place in the Champions League, Ruben Amorim’s Man United side are still sitting in the bottom half of the Premier League season. With less […] The post Report: Ruben Amorim is unhappy with two things happening at Man United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim needs a radical Sir Alex Ferguson-style rebuild at Manchester United but has been given a far weaker hand than recent managers at Old Trafford, writes JOE BERNSTEIN
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN: Curiously, no team bar Manchester City has won more trophies in the last nine years than Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Man United vs Fulham Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Manchester United face Fulham at Old Trafford today with a spot in the quarter-finals of the FA Cup up for grabs. Ahead of the game, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted...

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Fulham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Manchester United are aiming to build on their nervous 3-2 win against Ipswich Town when they host Fulham in the FA Cup fifth round on Sunday. The ten-man Red Devils stumbled to victory midweek to earn some much-needed respite but the pressure will return ahead of Sunday's cup duel with the Cottagers.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Inter Milan 'lining up loan move' for Red Devils attacker
arts.sum: Inter Milan could allegedly make a move for Manchester United attacker Mason Mount during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man United wonderkid could soon make first-team breakthrough after "really excited" claim
arts.sum: Manchester United Under-18s head coach Adam Lawrence says that the Red Devils are "really excited" about the development of Jaydan Kamason.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid move ahead of Man Utd for €60m wonderkid
arts.sum: Real Madrid have moved ahead of Manchester United in the race to sign Bournemouth sensation Dean Huijsen this summer. The clause was inserted when Huijsen joined Bournemouth from Juventus last summer.

arts.ttl: Manchester United receive Chido-Obi team news hint ahead of Fulham FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Talented forward Chido-Obi may be involved for Man United in their FA Cup clash at home to Fulham on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Fulham XI vs Manchester United – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Fulham head to Manchester United to take on the holders in the FA Cup’s fifth round this afternoon. The West Londoners are aiming to reach the quarter-finals for just the second time since 2010/11. Fulham have never won a major trophy, but with several of the competition’s big names already eliminated will be hopeful of […] The post Fulham XI vs Manchester United – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim addresses transfer situation amid fresh Alejandro Garnacho exit rumours
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says that summer departures are inevitable amid fresh speculation surrounding Alejandro Garnacho's future.
